plant.description: Often called 'Babchi' oil in modern skincare.

method_1.method: Topical oil application followed by sunlight (sun exposure).

medicinal_uses: The primary herb for Vitiligo (Leucoderma) and psoriasis.
Used for hair growth and scalp health.

safety_profile.warning: Can cause skin irritation; always dilute. Consult professional.
safety_profile.medical_supervision: Use under the guidance of a qualified Ayurvedic practitioner.

plant_profile.note: AI estimated profile based on known properties
